Description:
240GRABBA ( 2G ) (BUDGET)

Grabba

Need some Grabba? We've got Grabba. Grabba Leaf is the gold standard in the Roll-Your-Own industry: it represents the benchmark that all similar products try to reach. Grabba Leaf is inspected and selected from the finest tobacco available, to ensure a smooth smoke from the very first moment you taste it. Nice and dry for all your smoking needs. Not too dry, though, so you can roll it up into whatever size and shape you need. Roll all the blunts you like, or break some up and mix it in with your flower of choice. We're not here to tell you how to use your Grabba, only to provide it for you. Grabba is derived from the Fronto tobacco leaf, and is largely popular throughout Jamaica and other Caribbean islands. When properly dried and cured, the leaf is easily rolled and releases a flavourful, chocolate-y smoke when ignited. The Fronto leaf is also known as 'Fanta', so whether you smoke Fronto, Fanta, or Grabba, it's all the same shit. Typically, Fronto is used to refer to the full leaf, while Grabba refers to the broken-down form of the leaf that can either be smoked by itself or used as an enhancer when combined with other smokable substances. Typically, this is done to both alter the flavour and add a slight tobacco buzz to the effects of whatever you smoke with the leaf. Most of the time, that's probably gonna be weed. Grabba is the most popular form of the leaf in North America, as it's the perfect size and thickness to break up and smoke or roll with. Full Fronto leaves require extra preparation before you can use them (unless you plan to smoke a MONSTER blunt), and usually won't roll as nice as their much smaller counterparts. When the leaf is too thick, the blunt won't be able to burn very well, and then you might have to re-roll it. We do our best to maintain consistent stock on Grabba, so we'll always have it when you need it.

607CHERRY BLASTERS ( 1200MG ) (EDIBLES)

Northern Extracts - Cherry Blasters

The perfect dose: 240MG – with 5pcs (240mg per pcs). Cherry Blasters offer the nostalgic taste that you remember with the kick you’re looking for! Pair your afternoon with just a few fresh cherries for a relaxing but stimulating high. Cherry Blasters have a mix of sweet and sour flavours, just like the candy they're based on. If anything, this version is a little tastier because its made with higher quality ingredients. The taste conceals the earthy notes of cannabis extremely well, to the point that you might wonder if you're getting any THC at all from eating them! Considering the 240mg dosage, though, I can promise that you'll feel it when it hits. Newer users might consider breaking apart the individual gummies, as 240mg is a fairly high does for anyone without experience ingesting edibles. If you aren't familiar with your personal tolerance level, err on the side of caution and try a piece of a gummy before you devour one whole. I think you'll thank me, if you do. The Cherry Blasters look less like their legal counterparts than Buzzy Peaches do, but since they're candy, it's important to be cautious if you live with children or adults who can't ingest cannabis edibles for medical reasons. The outside of the packaging might not look like the actual branding for Cherry Blasters, but it definitely looks like candy to a kid. I'm not gonna harp on this, but please be careful. Cherry Blasters bring the taste, just like their namesake. You might find yourself puckering as they go down, but by the time you start to feel the edible's effects, you'll only taste sweet cherry as sheer relaxation takes ahold of you. Be careful with your dosage, or you might just slip away into a sweet and sour void of restful, dreamless sleep.

Pink Rockstar is a heavy-hitting indica (70% indica / 30% sativa) that’s all about deep chill with a side of style. Bred from the iconic Pink Kush and Rockstar Kush, this strain isn’t just a looker — it’s a full-on relaxation session wrapped in frosty pink crystals.

\n

\n

Flavor-wise, Pink Rockstar plays it smooth and balanced — spicy floral notes mix with fresh woods and earthy undertones, making every hit a mellow, flavorful ride.

\n

If you want a beautiful, potent indica that feels like a warm hug after a long day, Pink Rockstar is where it’s at.

Derived from the classic Bubba Kush strain, Bubba Kush Shake retains the core characteristics of its parent strain, offering a similar experience but in a more fragmented form.
\n

While the texture and form may differ from full buds, the potency and flavor of the shake can still offer a satisfying experience, especially for those who enjoy using it for joints or cooking cannabis-infused edibles.
\n
\nBubba Kush (Shake) provides deeply calming effects, ideal for unwinding after a long day or for use in the evening. Name: PINK WAGYU STAR *SUPER EXOTICS*
Short description:
Pink Wagyu Star is a premium, balanced hybrid (60% indica / 40% sativa) that smokes like pure luxury. This strain delivers a rich, stoney experience that’s both mentally hazy and physically grounding — the kind of high that makes you forget what time it is, and not care one bit.

\n

The flavor? Straight gourmet. Creamy kush blends with savory funk, earthy spice, and a hint of that meaty, Wagyu-style depth that sticks to your tongue. On the nose, it’s loud — sweet candy and citrus peel layered over dank gas and kush musk. One crack of the jar and the room knows what's up.

\n

As for the high, Pink Wagyu Star doesn’t play around. It rolls in fast with a cloudy headrush that melts your thoughts into a warm buzz. You’ll be grinning, zoning, vibing — locked into whatever chill wave you're riding. Perfect for late-night couch sessions, deep convos, or just sitting still and letting the world fade out.

\n

The buds are next-level: chunky, bright emerald green nugs shaped like mini pine cones, wrapped in orange hairs and iced out in golden-white crystal trichomes. Top-shelf look, top-shelf smoke.

\n

If you're into strains that bring flavor, balance, and a proper stoned-out vibe, Pink Wagyu Star delivers every time — smooth, loud, and heavy in all the right ways.

Name: DEAD HEAD * EXTREME EXOTIC *
Short description:
Deadhead ain’t playin’ around. This sativa-dominant hybrid (60% sativa / 40% indica) comes in hot, smacks your brain first, then eases your body into that golden zone where everything feels just right. It’s cerebral, buzzy, and trippy with a touch of that old-school stoner weirdness — the kind of high that makes you laugh mid-thought and forget what you were talking about in the best way possible.

\n

The come-up is quick and electric — like flipping a switch in your skull. That first wave hits the forehead with a euphoric zap, turning the lights on upstairs and flooding your mind with ideas, nonsense, or whatever rabbit hole you wanna dive into. Think lifted, scattered, and vibey. Deep convos, dumb jokes, zoning out to music — it’s all fair game.

\n

As your head floats higher, your body follows with that mellow, weightless drift. Not couchlocked — just chill. Loose limbs, relaxed vibes, and maybe a sudden need for snacks or a playlist that slaps. Deadhead keeps you in that sweet spot where you're alert but lowkey, wired but wavy.

\n

Flavor? Loud and funky. Imagine sweet cherry with a sour citrus twist, a little skunk, a hit of pine, and that earthy backbone that grounds the whole thing. The smell? Gassy cherry cough drop dropped in dirt — in the best way possible.

\n

Looks-wise, this bud shows out: neon green nugs, fiery orange hairs, and a frosty blanket of trichomes that shimmer like TV static. Sticky, stanky, and straight fire.

\n

Deadhead is your go-to when you wanna stay lit but not locked. Perfect for creative sparks, stress fades, deep hangs, or just floating through the day (or night) in your own psychedelic lane.

609BUZZY PEACHES ( 1200MG ) (EDIBLES)

Northern Extracts - Buzzy Peaches 1200mg THC

Buzzy Peaches are a childhood classic that you can still enjoy as an adult, but as an edible! Buzzy Peaches are perfect when you're looking to binge-watch some Netflix after work, or when you want to sit around and reminisce with friends about when you were kids. They're nostalgia central, basically. Buzzy Peaches have a mix of sweet and sour flavours, just like the candy they're based on. If anything, this version is a little tastier because its made with higher quality ingredients. The taste conceals the earthy notes of cannabis extremely well, to the point that you might wonder if you're getting any THC at all from eating them! Considering the 80mg dosage, though, I can promise that you'll feel it when it hits. Buzzy Peaches gummies strongly resemble their more legal counterpart, so practice caution if you live with children or anyone else who can't ingest cannabis edibles for medical reasons. I know it seems like I shouldn't have to say this, but there was that story from 680 news last year about a kid having to go the hospital because he ate a whole bag of 'em. They taste exactly like the candies, and the package has a single letter different. The kid was probably too young to even read the packaging! Just be careful, is all. Buzzy Peaches are delicious, but no one wants a panicked trip to the hospital because they left their gummies right beside the OJ. The perfect dose: 80MG – with 5 pieces in each bag.

Name: PINK GOD
Short description:
Pink God 
A cross between two heavy hitters — Pink Kush and God Bud — Pink God brings that classic knock-you-out indica vibe with a little twist of euphoria. This one's for the nights when sleep feels just out of reach, or when you just want to fully unplug from the noise.

\n

Right after that last hit, you’ll feel your mood lift as your mind drifts into a hazy, blissed-out state. All the stress, the overthinking, the heavy energy — gone. What takes its place? Pure peace. It’s like your thoughts are floating on clouds. Then the body high kicks in — warm, soothing waves that spread slow and deep, eventually pinning you to the couch in the best possible way. Don’t make plans — you’re not moving for a while.

\n

As the night rolls on, Pink God fully takes over, guiding you into deep, restful sleep. Whether you’re dealing with stress, pain, mood swings, or just need a serious wind-down, this strain has your back.

\n

Flavor-wise, it’s a treat: sweet berry and cherry notes with a smooth, herbal finish. The aroma matches — think ripe red fruit and soft floral vibes, like a stroll through a berry garden at sunset. The buds are just as pretty — fluffy, forest green with pink highlights, bright hairs, and a frosty layer of trichomes.

Short description:
Pink Snoop Dog
When it’s time to kick back like a true OG, Pink Snoop Dog steps up. This smooth indica-dominant hybrid is all about mellow vibes, heavy relaxation, and letting the stress roll off your shoulders like smoke in the wind. Born from the legendary Pink Kush and God Bud, this strain blends old-school power with new-school flavor.

\n

The high hits slow and easy — first your mind catches a lift, clearing out all the noise with a wave of chilled-out euphoria. No worries, no rush — just you vibin’. Then the body melt begins. Warm, full-body comfort takes over, wrapping you up like your favorite hoodie and gently locking you into whatever seat you landed in. Couch mode: engaged.

\n

This one’s perfect for late nights, deep thoughts, or just shutting the world out. If you’re carrying stress, pain, or sleeplessness, Pink Snoop Dog’s got you — laid-back and lowkey, just how it should be.

The aroma’s like a mix of fresh-picked fruit and soft rose petals — subtle, but unforgettable. And the buds? Sticky, fluffy, forest green with bright pink flashes, orange hairs, and frosty trichs that sparkle like they’ve been blessed by the Doggfather himself.

Name: GIRL SCOUT CRACK
Short description:
Girl Scout Crack is a unique indica strain that combines the best of both worlds—deep relaxation and a subtle mental uplift. Its dense, frosty buds display vibrant green tones accented by orange hairs, all dusted with a thick layer of sparkling trichomes. This visually appealing strain not only boasts beauty but also packs a potent punch, making it a favorite for those looking to unwind and de-stress.

The aroma of Girl Scout Crack is an enticing blend of sweet, earthy, and slightly pungent notes, with hints of baked goods reminiscent of the classic Girl Scout Cookie strain. When smoked or vaped, the flavor carries over, offering a smooth, sweet taste with subtle earthy undertones and a touch of spice. The sweet, dessert-like flavor makes this strain enjoyable for those who appreciate rich, flavorful cannabis.

In terms of effects, Girl Scout Crack provides a heavy body high that induces a deep sense of relaxation, making it ideal for evening or nighttime use. Despite its indica dominance, it also offers a mild cerebral uplift, helping to ease mental stress and bring about a calm, happy state of mind without being too overwhelming. It’s perfect for those looking to relax both mentally and physically, and it’s especially beneficial for managing pain, anxiety, and insomnia.

Pink Fire OG is a perfect choice for those seeking both mental and physical relaxation, offering a balanced yet powerful experience.

Name: PINK KOBE *SUPER EXOTICS*
Short description:
Pink Kobe is a heavy indica strain. Named in honor of the iconic Kobe Bryant, this strain delivers a smooth, euphoric high paired with full-body relaxation that hits like a buzzer-beater in overtime — calm, deep, and satisfying.

\n

The effects start in the head, bringing on a lifted, feel-good vibe that clears your mind and lifts your mood. Not long after, a warm, calming wave rolls through your body, melting away tension and locking you into a state of pure chill. Whether you're kicking back to watch a game or just need to tap out for the night, Pink Kobe has that lights-out kind of relaxation.

\n

Flavor-wise, it's a sweet and creamy mix of citrus and gas — sugary on the inhale, with a kushy, earthy finish that lingers. The aroma is loud and unmistakable: diesel, sweet fruit, and floral notes wrapped in that signature Pink Kush funk.

\n

Buds are dense and chunky, shaped like little green grapes, covered in icy white trichomes with golden undertones and thin orange hairs. Pink Kobe doesn’t just smoke good — it looks like quality.

\n

Ideal for easing stress, pain, low appetite, or just getting into full wind-down mode, Pink Kobe is for smokers who appreciate flavor, potency, and that real-deal indica feel.

The aroma is equally delightful, blending rich sweetness with a pungent floral overtone, paired with fresh citrus and tropical fruit notes. Each exquisite bud is flecked with fiery orange pistils and coated in shimmering trichomes that stick to your fingers as you break them apart.

However, it’s best avoided if you’re prone to anxiety, as its effects can be quite intense.
\n
\nSunburst Haze is ideal for addressing fatigue, mood swings, depression, and general stress, among other conditions. It’s a bright burst of happiness in a bud, perfect for those looking to embrace the day with a renewed sense of energy.

Name: TUNA BREAD
Description:
TUNA BREAD

\nTuna Bread is a captivating indica strain known for its relaxing effects and rich flavor profile, making it a sought-after choice among cannabis enthusiasts. This strain typically features dense, compact buds with a striking mix of deep greens and rosy pink hues, adorned with a generous layer of sparkling trichomes. Its visually appealing appearance reflects its potency, inviting users to explore the delightful experience it offers. \n \nThe aroma of Tuna Bread is a harmonious blend of earthy and sweet notes, often accompanied by hints of spice and citrus. This complex fragrance creates an inviting atmosphere, making it a pleasure to indulge in. When smoked or vaped, Tuna Bread delivers a smooth, flavorful experience, with a taste that mirrors its scent profile. Users can expect a rich, creamy flavor with subtle undertones of fruitiness, providing a satisfying and enjoyable smoking experience. \n \nIn terms of effects, Tuna Bread is celebrated for its deeply relaxing and soothing qualities. Users often report a calming body high that eases tension and promotes tranquility, making it an ideal choice for unwinding after a long day. This strain also has mood-enhancing properties, often inducing feelings of happiness and contentment. Whether you're seeking relief from stress, anxiety, or physical discomfort, Tuna Brea provides a well-rounded and satisfying experience that leaves users feeling blissfully relaxed and at ease. \n \n  \n

Name: DEATH BUBBA 3G
Description:
DEATH BUBBA

\n

Death Bubba: A Potent and Tranquil Indica Strain

\n

Death Bubba is a powerful indica-dominant cannabis strain renowned for its deeply relaxing effects, pungent aroma, and striking appearance. A cross between the legendary Bubba Kush and Death Star, this strain boasts dense, frosty buds covered in a thick layer of trichomes, with deep green and purple hues intertwined with fiery orange pistils. Its aroma is a bold fusion of earthy pine, musky spice, and a hint of citrus, creating an intense and immersive sensory experience.

\n

Upon inhalation, Death Bubba delivers an initial wave of euphoria, uplifting the mind and enhancing mood while subtly sharpening focus. However, as the high progresses, a heavy, sedative body effect takes over, melting away tension and stress while ushering in deep relaxation. This potent strain is best enjoyed in the evening or before bed, as its profoundly calming effects often lead to a restful and rejuvenating sleep.

\n

Favored by both recreational and medicinal users, Death Bubba is an excellent choice for those seeking relief from chronic pain, insomnia, stress, and anxiety. Its strong, full-bodied effects and bold terpene profile make it a go-to strain for cannabis connoisseurs who appreciate a deeply tranquil and long-lasting experience. Whether winding down after a long day or seeking restorative rest, Death Bubba delivers an unparalleled sense of relaxation that lingers long after the last exhale.

Purple Runtz is an alluring indica-dominant hybrid cannabis strain celebrated for its vibrant purple hues, potent effects, and delightful aroma. A cross between Zkittlez and Gelato, this strain offers a unique combination of sweet and fruity flavors with hints of earthiness and spice. Its dense, resinous buds are characterized by shades of deep purple and bright orange pistils, creating a visually stunning appearance that is sure to impress. Purple Runtz delivers a well-balanced high that begins with a euphoric cerebral buzz, promoting creativity and mental clarity, before gently transitioning into a soothing body relaxation that eases tension and stress. This versatile strain is ideal for both daytime and evening use, offering relief from symptoms of anxiety, depression, and chronic pain while inducing a sense of calm and relaxation. With its potent effects and enticing aroma, Purple Runtz has become a favorite among cannabis enthusiasts seeking a flavorful and enjoyable experience. Whether used for recreational enjoyment or medicinal purposes, this strain offers a luxurious and soothing cannabis experience that is sure to leave a lasting impression. Its combination of vibrant purple colors, sweet and fruity flavors, and well-rounded effects make Purple Runtz a standout choice for those looking to elevate their cannabis experience to new heights.

Name: PINK TUSSI *SUPER EXOTIC*
Short description:
Pink Tussi is a perfectly balanced hybrid strain (50% indica / 50% sativa), known for its striking appearance and a high often described as harmonious, Pink Tussi delivers a well-rounded blend of mental stimulation and physical relaxation—ideal for anyone seeking a full-body, uplifting experience. \n

The buds of Pink Tussi are eye-catching: fluffy, grape-shaped, and emerald-green in color, accented with thin orange hairs, golden hues, and a heavy dusting of rose-gold crystal trichomes. When you break apart these sparkling nugs, you're met with an enticing bouquet of sweet cherry fruitiness, tropical citrus zest, and a touch of spicy floral aroma.

\n

The flavor mirrors the scent, offering a delicious combination of sugary Maraschino cherries, vibrant tropical citrus, and subtle spicy floral notes. As you exhale, the effects kick in almost instantly—bringing a euphoric wave of happiness that boosts creativity and elevates your mood. This mental uplift is balanced by a gentle physical calm, keeping your body grounded while your mind soars.

\n

Pink Tussi is a strong choice for managing symptoms of chronic stress, anxiety, mood swings, depression, pain, and nausea. Whether you're looking to unwind or get inspired, Pink Tussi offers a uniquely satisfying, well-rounded high.

Name: PURPLE PUNCH
Short description:
Biscotti Gelato is a well-balanced hybrid strain that combines the best traits of its parent strains, Biscotti and Gelato. Known for its dense, trichome-covered buds, this strain features rich purple and green hues, giving it a visually appealing appearance. The aroma is a delightful mix of sweet, earthy notes, with hints of vanilla, citrus, and spice, creating a dessert-like scent that is both rich and inviting.
\n
\nWhen consumed, Biscotti Gelato offers a balanced high, delivering both cerebral stimulation and physical relaxation. The initial effects include an uplifting mental buzz that promotes creativity and euphoria, making it suitable for daytime activities. As the high progresses, users experience a gentle body relaxation, helping to alleviate stress, anxiety, and mild pain without overwhelming sedation. Biscotti Gelato is perfect for those seeking a smooth, flavorful experience that blends mental clarity with physical calm.

Name: PINK ASTRO *SUPER EXOTIC*
Short description:
Blast off with Pink Astro, a cosmic indica-leaning experience that’s all about floating away from the stress of Earth. One toke is all it takes to launch your mind into the stars, where thoughts drift, time melts, and everything just feels right. The high kicks off with a smooth cerebral liftoff—think hazy euphoria, soft focus, and a creative spark that lights up your inner space.

\n

As you settle deeper into orbit, a wave of calming body vibes wraps around you like a gravity blanket—warm, cozy, and just heavy enough to anchor your soul. Whether you're chilling with music, zoning out with art, or simply couch-locked under a galaxy of thoughts, Pink Astro delivers the perfect escape pod.

\n

Flavor-wise, it hits with sweet cherry citrus on the inhale and a rich, earthy kush finish on the exhale—pungent, spicy, and unforgettable. The nugs are fat and fluffy with a deep forest green color, fiery orange hairs, and a galaxy of amber crystal trichomes dusted over every surface.

\n

Pink Astro isn’t just a vibe—it’s an experience. Perfect for nighttime sessions, deep thoughts, or just checking out from reality for a while.
